text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm seeing more hot chocolate 
in the vending machines lately.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait a minute. The vending machines 
at the dorms all have only cold drinks.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Some people get stomachaches if they drink 
too many cold drinks, don't they?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: …Okay, this sounds like a job for the RAs!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll have a chat with Fuji and see 
if we can get the people in charge 
to add some hot options!
